  "findings": [
    "Wrong hanger staged for the specified joist size, which violates structural submittals and building codes."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Reject the staged hangers and replace them with the correct Simpson Strong-Tie hangers specified in the approved structural drawings and submittals before installation begins."
  ],
  "rationale": "Using an undersized or incorrect hanger for the joist size reduces the load-carrying capacity of the connection, violating IRC requirements and manufacturer specifications. Because the work is staged, the incorrect materials must be rejected and replaced prior to installation.",

  ]
